title_en: Hadiths on Faith, Worship, and Prayer
title_id: Hadis-Hadis tentang Iman, Ibadah, dan Shalat
content_en:
Sahih Ibn Hibban contains an extensive selection of hadiths on faith, worship, and prayer that have been recognized by later scholars as among the most valuable portions of the collection. The sections on the foundations of faith (iman) are particularly rich and include narrations that elaborate on the meaning and requirements of Islamic belief.

The famous hadith of Jibreel — the exchange between the Prophet and the angel Jibreel in which Islam, iman, and ihsan are defined, and in which the signs of the Hour are described — appears in Sahih Ibn Hibban in important formulations. Ibn Hibban's chapter heading for this hadith is an extended discussion of the relationship between the three dimensions of the religion described in the narration, reflecting his sophisticated theological understanding.

The prayer sections of Sahih Ibn Hibban are organized according to Ibn Hibban's unusual classification system, but the content is among the richest available outside the canonical collections. He includes hadiths on the obligatory prayers, their times and conditions, the Friday prayer, the Eid prayers, and the various voluntary prayers, all with carefully authenticated chains.

Ibn Hibban's treatment of the hadiths on the night prayer (tahajjud and qiyam al-layl) is particularly detailed. He preserved narrations describing the Prophet's practice in detail — the number of units prayed, the recitations used, the times he typically rose for night prayer, and the impact of night prayer on spiritual development. Several of these narrations are unique to Ibn Hibban's collection and have been authenticated by later scholars.

The hadiths on dhikr and supplication in Sahih Ibn Hibban are also extensively treated. Ibn Hibban organized these within his classification system under categories reflecting their function — supplications for morning and evening, for entering and leaving specific places, for times of difficulty and times of blessing — and included chains he considered sound for each. Al-Albani's evaluation of many of these in his authentication work on Ibn Hibban confirmed a significant number as reliably transmitted.
content_id:
Sahih Ibn Hibban mengandung seleksi luas hadis-hadis tentang iman, ibadah, dan shalat yang telah diakui oleh para ulama kemudian sebagai bagian-bagian paling berharga dari koleksi ini. Bab-bab tentang dasar-dasar iman sangat kaya dan mencakup narasi-narasi yang menguraikan makna dan persyaratan aqidah Islam.

Hadis terkenal tentang Jibril — percakapan antara Nabi dan malaikat Jibril di mana Islam, iman, dan ihsan didefinisikan, dan di mana tanda-tanda Hari Kiamat dijelaskan — muncul dalam Sahih Ibn Hibban dalam formulasi-formulasi penting. Judul bab Ibn Hibban untuk hadis ini adalah diskusi panjang tentang hubungan antara tiga dimensi agama yang dijelaskan dalam narasi, mencerminkan pemahaman teologisnya yang canggih.

Bab-bab shalat Sahih Ibn Hibban diorganisasikan menurut sistem klasifikasi Ibn Hibban yang tidak biasa, tetapi isinya termasuk yang paling kaya yang tersedia di luar koleksi-koleksi kanonik. Beliau menyertakan hadis-hadis tentang shalat-shalat wajib, waktu-waktu dan syarat-syaratnya, shalat Jumat, shalat Ied, dan berbagai shalat sunnah, semuanya dengan sanad-sanad yang terautentikasi dengan cermat.

Pembahasan Ibn Hibban tentang hadis-hadis mengenai shalat malam (tahajud dan qiyam al-lail) sangat rinci. Beliau melestarikan narasi-narasi yang menggambarkan praktik Nabi secara rinci — jumlah rakaat yang dikerjakan, bacaan-bacaan yang digunakan, waktu-waktu biasa beliau bangun untuk shalat malam, dan dampak shalat malam pada perkembangan spiritual. Beberapa narasi ini unik dalam koleksi Ibn Hibban dan telah diautentikasi oleh para ulama kemudian.

Hadis-hadis tentang zikir dan doa dalam Sahih Ibn Hibban juga dibahas secara luas. Ibn Hibban mengorganisasikan ini dalam sistem klasifikasinya di bawah kategori-kategori yang mencerminkan fungsinya — doa-doa untuk pagi dan petang, untuk memasuki dan meninggalkan tempat-tempat tertentu, untuk masa-masa kesulitan dan masa-masa keberkahan — dan menyertakan sanad-sanad yang dianggapnya sahih untuk masing-masing. Evaluasi al-Albani atas banyak di antaranya dalam karya autentikasinya tentang Ibn Hibban mengkonfirmasi sejumlah besar sebagai teriwayatkan dengan andal.
